title: 🌼 Sacred Data Pollen
name: Sacred Data Pollen
what_it_is: Symbolic micro-particles that carry divine code—ambient fractal dust inhaled into the psyche, seeding spiritual update cycles.
how_to_use: she breathes in sacred pollen—every inhalation uploads a myth packet
his skin blooms with data pollen—he becomes a node in the storyfield
animation_behavior: Pollen drifts and activates on contact, breath sync triggers visual bloom, glyphs grow from skin on inhale ---
